CustomField.description: Indicates the type of the source operational transaction record. Prepayment functionality is already deprecated.Keeping the lookup to track historical prepayments
CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c),'Invoice', IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c),(IF(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c,'CN_Payment'),'Credit','Payment')), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Prepayment__c),'Prepayment', IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payables__c),'Payable', IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payouts__c),IF(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Payout_Type__c, 'Cash'),'Payout - Cash','Payout - Offset'), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__c),'Credit Memo', IF(!ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__c ),'Payment on Account', '')))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates the type of the source operational transaction record.
CustomField.label: Transaction Type
